rulings.Case Title: CARLOS M ARROYO et al VS. ACTION FORECLOSURE SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Defts' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 5, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs DCR MORTGAGE III SUB I, LLC and DIRECTED CAPITAL RESOURCES, LLC's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. Grant confirmation of arbitration award. See Louis Garden of Encino Homeowner's Association vs. Truck Insurance Exchange, cited in reply. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RALAN WONG VS. TIFFANY BARBER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Mask The Unlawful Detainer Proceedings Or, In The Alternative, To Seal The Records
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 5, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs TIFFANY BARBER, SARAH SHARAF and MATT PINNA's Motion To Mask The Unlawful Detainer Proceedings Or, In The Alternative, To Seal The Records. Deny sealing or remasking, not narrowly tailored. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. COURTNIE NEASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 5, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT COURTNIE NEASLEY's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVE JOHNSON VS. CAROL A PLECAS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 5, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF DAVE JOHNSON's Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Entry Of Judgment. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW VS. MARIA E ROSALES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 5, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Off Calendar. Rosales' answer stricken Oct. 26, 2012. Castillo defaulted Sept. 18, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, VS. LARRY CHEW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 5, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT LARRY CHEW's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny, 1) Untimely per CCP 1005; 2) Failed to sustain burden per CCP 1008 and or CCP 473. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEBRA SIMMS VS. EMANUEL SIMMS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 5, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs MATTHEW SIMMS, JAMIE TAGGERT and EMANUEL SIMMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective seeks back rent for period exceeding twelve months. CCP 1161(2). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REAL EQUITY PARTNERS, LLC VS. BENNY MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 5, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANTs CAITLIN FITTING and BENJAMIN MARTIN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Sustain with leave to amend to allege notice is cure or quit. = (501/REQ)
